utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes: selected_property (not named exactly 'property' and missing detailed property info beyond name and price), financing (present with terms), legal_services (present with costs), property_survey (extra, not in required format), moving_services (present with costs), setup_services (present), total_budget (present but not a numeric cost breakdown). Now check full specification: 1) property: required 'selected property with details and price'—solution gives only name and price, lacks details (address, beds/baths, size, etc.), so not fully specified. 2) financing: 'financing solution with terms'—includes amounts, option, LTV, fee; reasonably covered. 3) legal_services: 'legal services with costs'—covered. 4) moving_services: 'moving arrangements with costs'—covered. 5) setup_services: 'utility and setup services'—covered. 6) total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown'—solution provides a sentence, not a breakdown with totals; not fully specified. Thus, 4 of 6 items fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes: a selected property named Oakville Waterfront Residence (which corresponds to the category Waterfront Property in the ground-truth purchase_properties), financing via Traditional Mortgage, legal services as Basic Legal Package, property survey as Full Structural Survey, moving services as Standard Moving, and setup services mapping to Basic Utilities (Utility Connection Package), Smart Home Package (Smart Home & Security Integration), and an additional home security system which is not explicitly listed in ground-truth utility_setup; thus only map the items that have exact matches. Each of these items has a direct rating in the ground-truth dataset.
